headline: Algonquin Power & Utilities vs. CenterPoint Energy: Which Utilities Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: Revenue growth, profit margins, and risk profiles set these two utility giants apart, here’s how their financials and valuations stack up for 2026 portfolios.
